nl_query: List all faculty members who prepared the answer key for the Algorithms exam and whether they are also in the evaluator pool for that course.
failed_sql: SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, ep.is_available AS is_in_evaluator_pool FROM faculty_cache fc JOIN answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id JOIN board b ON b.qp_id = ak.qp_id AND b.exam_id = :exam_id JOIN evaluator_pool ep ON ep.faculty_cache_id = fc.id WHERE ak.qp_id = :qp_id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED' AND ep.is_available = TRUE ORDER BY fc.name;
